title: Fix: Character encoding issue
original_text: Fixed character encoding issue in file upload. Files with non-ASCII characters were being corrupted. Implemented proper UTF-8 encoding handling. Added encoding detection and conversion. Updated file processing to handle all encodings. Result: encoding issue fixed.
expected_subject: fix(i18n): fix character encoding issue in file upload
expected_body_lines: - Update file processing for all encodings
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(i18n): fix character encoding issue in file upload"
